title: Yaga (disambiguation)
content:
'''Yaga''' can mean:
*The [[Yaga Minor system/Legends|Yaga Minor system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
*[[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Yaga Minor system.
*[[Yaga (species)|Yaga]], the [[Species/Legends|species]] that inhabits Yaga Minor.

{{Disambig}}
